cards.name: 4 of Cups
cards.interpretation: apathy, contemplation, feeling disconnected, melancholy, boredom, indifference, discontent

cards.name: ⅩⅨ The Sun, reversed
cards.interpretation: blocked happiness, excessive enthusiasm, pessimism, unrealistic expectations, conceitedness

cards.name: ⅩⅩⅠ The World, reversed
cards.interpretation: lack of closure, lack of achievement, feeling incomplete, emptiness
